message:
refactor: minor formatting adjustments across cancel, migration, web, and tests

Formatting-only changes produced by concurrent agent work:
- cancel/symbol_cancel.rs: reformat method signature
- migration/mod.rs: simplify match arm expressions
- web/router.rs: adjust route path formatting
- tests/io_uring_reactor.rs: reformat test assertions
